title: 宝塚記念の後に・父から子へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross wins the Takarazuka Kinen.
Miraculously, as if in response to her fantastic
performance, her father recovers too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't need to worry about her family
anymore. Having inherited her father's lightning,
Tamamo Cross heads for the autumn Tenno Sho
as the second-generation Lightning.
